ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "dataset_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "train_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "mape" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error */,
  "wape" REAL /* Weighted absolute percentage error */,
  "r2" REAL /* Coefficient of determination (R-squared) */,
  "mpe" REAL /* Mean percentage error */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key to identify the dataset or scenario */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the training process */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., agriculture, finance) */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key to identify the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Total size of the dataset in MB or GB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the specific version */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process for this version */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the training process for this version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., training, evaluation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
